description: THE CULMINATING DOCTRINE. Install as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md. Successor to tungsten-forge v2.0 (whose discipline is inherited absolutely). Contains: the Maze parable (Dijkstra vs A* = TUNGSTEN's blindness vs the learned heuristic); the Spectrum doctrine (adding lenses monotonically sharpens the read, +0.449->+0.600 ATR, and the lens that STOPS helping is the instrument reporting its own limit); the Striving Mandate (pursue 100% while honestly reporting 57%); the VOXEL/CHEMISTRY model (every bar an element with heat/pressure/bonds; same element in different heat yields different product -- reactions, not signals); the Great Dissolution (the entire chart-pattern canon tested on 65k bars: candlestick reversals ALL noise, bearish patterns INVERTED, the 61.8% golden pocket p=0.650 inert, and the momentum-matched control proving patterns add NOTHING beyond displacement -- survivors: Double Bottom +1.900 ATR, and the squeeze as a STATE not a trigger); the death of hard regimes (9-box IC=+0.001 p=0.92 vs soft membership IC=+0.036 p=0.013); the meteorological correction (persistence 0.71, ensemble cone, THE GATE: +1.008 ATR t=+4.11 vs +0.343 ungated, and the calibration table showing a correctable +4pt optimism bias); the Cartographer (memory as an organ: conviction gates accuracy 51%->56.8% hit and +0.841 ATR; novelty guard proves it KNOWS when it is lost at 49%). Six-layer architecture. Living-Log mandate: every log line must describe a present-tense act, no stale traces.
